name: LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Per-Document LoRA TTT
blurb: 11L U-Net (512dim, 27M params) with LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation, per-document LoRA TTT (rank-8, 3 epochs, chunk-256), SmearGate, BigramHash, depth-scaled residuals, SWA, Muon with WD, int8+zstd-22 quantization. Mean 0.9443 BPB across 3 seeds.
author: robinojw
